name: scroll-reveal
title: Scroll Reveal
description: Animation primitive — wraps any element to fade + slide in when scrolled into view. IntersectionObserver-based; fires once by default, optionally replays on every re-enter. Configurable from-direction (left/right/up/down), distance, threshold, rootMargin, duration, delay, easing. The workhorse for long-form kundenstimmen / Fallstudien pages. Modular: HOC-style, composes with any child. Sibling to SwipeIn and NotificationArrive. Honors `prefers-reduced-motion`.
